creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=28968616980e2ac0307c088c522f1473ccfe0a50

commit 28968616980e2ac0307c088c522f1473ccfe0a50
Author:     Michiel van Baak Jansen <michiel@vanbaak.eu>
AuthorDate: 2024-04-01 06:11:16 +0000
Commit:     Fernando Apesteguía <fernape@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2024-04-01 16:44:09 +0000

    net-p2p/readarr: Update to 0.3.21.2475

    ChangeLog: https://github.com/Readarr/Readarr/releases/tag/v0.3.21.2475

     * Fixed: Task progress messages in the UI
     * Fix BookInfo tests
     * Multiple Translations updated by Weblate
     * Fixed icons for macOS application
     * Link to author from book details
     * New: Show author names after task name when applicable
     * Fixed: Disabled select option still selectable
     * Ensure authors are populated in PageConnector
     * Ensure not allowed cursor is shown for disabled select inputs
     * Fixed: Wrapping of naming tokens with alternate separators

    PR:             278026
    Reported by:    michiel@vanbaak.eu (maintainer)

 net-p2p/readarr/Makefile  |  2 +-
 net-p2p/readarr/distinfo  |  6 +++---
 net-p2p/readarr/pkg-plist | 18 +++++++++---------
 3 files changed, 13 insertions(+), 13 deletions(-)
